endpoints.name: Get the activity stream of an organization
endpoints.description: Return an organization's activity stream
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the activity stream of an organization, HTML format
endpoints.description: Return an organization's activity stream as HTML
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get names of organizations that match a query string
endpoints.description: Return a list of organization names that contain a string
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get number of followers of an organization
endpoints.description: Return the number of followers of an organization
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get users following an organization
endpoints.description: Return a list of users that are following a given organization
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get names of all organizations
endpoints.description: Returns the names of all indexed organizations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get organizations that a user has a given permission for
endpoints.description: Return the organizations that the user has a given permission for
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get organization revisions
endpoints.description: Return an organization's revisions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get details of a specific organization
endpoints.description: Return the details of an organization
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the activity stream of a package (dataset)
endpoints.description: Returns a package's activity stream
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the activity stream of a package (dataset), HTML format
endpoints.description: The activity stream is rendered as a snippet of HTML meant to be included in an HTML pag, i.e it doesn't have any header or footer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find packages (datasets) matching a query
endpoints.description: Return a list of datasets that match a string
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get a list of all packages (datasets)
endpoints.description: Returns the names of all indexed packages (datasets)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get package (dataset) relationships
endpoints.description: Return a dataset's relationships
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get list of revisions for a package (dataset)
endpoints.description: Return a dataset's revision as a list of dictionaries
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find packages (datasets) matching query terms
endpoints.description: Searches for packages (datasets) matching the specified query terms
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get metadata about one specific package (dataset)
endpoints.description: Returns metadata about the package (dataset) corresponding to the specified unique name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Gets items related to a package (dataset)
endpoints.description: Returns a dataset's related items.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Find resources
endpoints.description: Returns a dictionary with two fields ``count`` and ``results``.             The ``count`` field contains the total number of Resources                found without the limit or query parameters having an effect.             The ``results`` field is a list of dictized Resource objects.             The query parameter is a required field. It is a string in                the form ``{field}:{term}`` or a list of strings, each of the             same form. Within each string, ``{field}`` is a field or extra             field on the Resource domain object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get metadata for a specific resource
endpoints.description: Return the metadata of a resource
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get the site status
endpoints.description: Returns the site status
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get a list of tags
endpoints.description: Returns the names of all indexed tags
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOV_API_KEY}} with your GOV API KEY.
